author: keonyrus
description: Read-only sync of Confluence Server pages into your vault as Markdown. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: KeonyRus
manifest.description: Read-only sync of Confluence Server pages into your vault as Markdown.
manifest.name: Confluence Reader

name: Confluence Reader

releases.author: KeonyRus
releases.description:
Initial release of Confluence Reader for Obsidian.

- Read-only sync of Confluence Server pages into your vault as Markdown
- Pull single pages or entire page trees recursively
- Personal Access Token authentication
- Attachment downloading support
- Frontmatter metadata with confluence-id, version, URL tracking
- Re-pull to update existing synced pages
- Space browsing command
- Status bar with last pull time
